info.title: Charger Control API Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. Published API scope is centered on command and control workflows for depot charging assets.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Charger Control API. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. These DepotFinity APIs are used to push operational control or command actions into the charging environment. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Un-Supported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. Published API scope is centered on command and control workflows for depot charging assets. Vendor documentation: https://developer.siemens.com/depotfinity/ChargerControlAPI/charger_control_api.html
